caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Grand Cayman Today
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing moderate easterly winds at 19 knots with wave heights reaching 6 feet and a dominant swell period of 6 seconds from the ESE. Rain probability is high at 90 percent, indicating significant precipitation likely to affect port operations and marine conditions in the Western Caribbean.

mediterranean.headline: Strong Winds and High Waves Impact Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing sustained winds of 21 knots with wave heights reaching 7.3 feet and a dominant northerly swell period of 8 seconds. Heavy rain is likely with a 97% probability, creating challenging conditions for marine and port operations.
